name_en: M83603 Green! Portefeuil Lisa compact wallet, made of Monogram canvas with a coin pocket with a handle and a middle pocket. The size is also charming for small bags and clutches. Features an interior bill compartment, 2 slip pockets, and 4 card slots.
name_cn:
M83603 Green! Portefeuil Lisa compact wallet, made of Monogram canvas with a coin pocket with a handle and a middle pocket. The size is also charming for small bags and clutches. Features an interior bill compartment, 2 slip pockets, and 4 card slots.
size:9×11.5×1.5cm.
